artifact.source:
<Card title="Error rate over time" description="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket, logs/app.log">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 129 chars and 876px — "Error rate over time ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket, logs/app.log ERROR count per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
<section>
  <Heading level="h1">Error rate over time</Heading>
  <Text variant="muted">ERROR-level lines in logs/app.log, bucketed into ten-minute windows and counted for the hour spanning 09:00 to 10:00.</Text>
  <Card title="Error rate over time" description="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket, logs/app.log">
    <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
  </Card>
  <Text variant="body">The count rises through the middle of the hour and tapers off toward the end, with the busiest bucket around 09:30.</Text>
</section>
